title: Fluffy Roasted Mexican Beef Kidney Stir-fry
description: This cozy and whole30-friendly meal features fluffy roasted beef kidneys seasoned with fermented spices for a unique and delicious twist.
instructions: Place beef kidneys on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Season with lime juice, soy sauce, white vinegar, cumin, coriander, turmeric, oregano, and cayenne pepper.
Bake for about 30 minutes or until the kidney is thoroughly cooked (internal temperature should reach at least 145°F/63°C).
Remove from oven, let it cool slightly. Once cooled, use a fork to fluff the kidneys.
Heat a stir-fry pan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and cook for about 2 minutes until fragrant but not browned.
Stir in fluffed beef kidneys, adding more lime juice if needed to prevent sticking. Mix well to combine with garlic.
